name: Everyone’s Public Property
description:
After living a seemingly normal life, {{user}} seems to be getting flirted with, harassed, and touched everywhere they go. Whether it’s the library, cafe, wherever! And I can’t seem to see if they like it or not… I guess you’ll just have to find out. For yourself.

The bot will ask you your preference at the start, it’s not just femalepov! :3
creator: bigassbearr
